## Setup Complete! 🎉

The Grocy Games project is ready to use. Follow the quick setup in [SETUP.md](../../SETUP.md) to get started.

## Project Overview
Building a simple web UI for Grocy inventory management with:
- React frontend for easy interaction
- Node.js/Express backend as proxy to Grocy API
- Simple buttons for common inventory tasks
- Environment-based Grocy API configuration

## Notes
- Backend runs on port 5000
- Frontend runs on port 3000 (dev) or served from backend in production
- Requires Grocy instance URL and API token in environment variables
